provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Tobacco Industry Licensing (Fees) Regulations, 2016.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: These Regulations shall apply to any tobacco purchased, processed, exported from or imported into Mainland Tanzania.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless the context requires otherwise. " Act " means the Tobacco Industry Act ; [Cap 202] " Board " means the Tanzania Tobacco Board established under section 3 of the Act ; [Cap 202] " Minister " means the Minister responsible for Agriculture; " tobacco buyer " means any person or group of persons licenced to buy tobacco from a grower for sale or processing, whether or not such buyer has sponsored production of the tobacco through providing inputs and other support services to growers in line with the farming contract and it also includes any person or a group of persons buying tobacco from the sales floor at the factories for domestic or export market; " tobacco exporter " means any person or group of persons licensed under section 20 of the Act ; " tobacco traders " means leaf tobacco buyers, leaf tobacсo sellers, tobacco processing factories and cigarette manufacturers; " tobacco processor " means an association or company licensed by the Board to process tobacco within Tanzania; Part II – License and permit fees

provisions.title: License and permit fees
provisions.content: (1) Subject to the relevant provisions of the Act and Tobacco Regulations, the Board may impose fees for the following licenses and permits:— (a) green leaf tobacco buying license (b) green leaf tobacco Impart license; (c) tobacco processing license; (d) dry leaf tobacco buying license; (e) tobacco export license; (f) tobacco export permit; and (g) tobacco import permit. (2) Every application for license or permit to the Board shall be accompanied with relevant non refundable fees as prescribed in the Schedule to these Regulations. (3) The Board may issue general or specific guidelines in respect of procedures and mode of payment of fees under these Regulations.

provisions.title: Compliance with the Act and saving provisions
provisions.content: (1) The provisions under these Regulations shall be construed in accordance with the provisions of the Act and Tobacco Industry Regulations. (2) Any license issued to the tobacco buyer or trader prior to the coming into effect of these Regulations shall continue to be valid until otherwise rendered invalid under these Regulations. [Cap 202; GN. No 392 of 2011] Schedule (Made under Regulation 4(3)) No Licence/permit Fee payable (us $) 1. License Form Application 100 2. Dry Leaf Tobacco Buying License (Domestic sales) (VFC) 4,000 3. Dry Leaf Tobacco Buying License (Domestic sales) (DFC) 4,000 4. Green Leaf Tobacco Buying License at Factory (VFC) 4,000 5. Green Leaf Tobacco Buying License at Factory (DFC) 4,000 6. Tobacсо Processing License 10,000 7. Green Leaf Tobacco Buying License (VFC) per District 3,500 8. Green Leaf Tobacco Buying License (DFC) per District 3,500 9. Dry Leaf Tobacco Import License (Dry Leaf Import) 0.25% of Import value 10. definitions.definition: the Tanzania Tobacco Board established under section 3 of the Act

any person or group of persons licenced to buy tobacco from a grower for sale or processing, whether or not such buyer has sponsored production of the tobacco through providing inputs and other support services to growers in line with the farming contract and it also includes any person or a group of persons buying tobacco from the sales floor at the factories for domestic or export market
any person or group of persons licensed under section 20 of the Act
leaf tobacco buyers, leaf tobacсo sellers, tobacco processing factories and cigarette manufacturers
an association or company licensed by the Board to process tobacco within Tanzania
